untranslatable_reason: Signal requires real-time option Greeks (delta, gamma, vega, theta) and theoretical pricing across multiple strikes and option types. These derivatives require live option chain data and Black-Scholes calculations not available in the allowed indicator set. Conditions like 'position delta neutral', 'combined theoretical edge positive', 'net vega exposure measurable', and 'gamma skew present' cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated volatility arbitrage signal requiring multi-leg options portfolio analysis. The core concept (exploit vol mispricing in HIGH_VOL regime) can only be approximated by using hvol_20 as a regime filter, but the actual spread construction, Greeks monitoring, and edge quantification require dedicated options analytics tools outside the scope of price-action technical indicators.
